examples.title: Algorithm: Stack Implementation
examples.description: A basic stack implementation using pseudocode
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Stack
INPUT: None
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 top = -1
 items = []

 PROCEDURE push(item)
 IF isFull() THEN
 THROW overflow error
 ELSE
 top = top + 1
 items[top] = item
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE pop()
 IF isEmpty() THEN
 THROW underflow error
 ELSE
 item = items[top]
 top = top - 1
 RETURN item
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE peek()
 IF isEmpty() THEN
 THROW underflow error
 ELSE
 RETURN items[top]
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE isEmpty()
 RETURN top == -1
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE isFull()
 RETURN top == MAX - 1
 END PROCEDURE
END ALGORITHM
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic stack implementation with push, pop, peek, isEmpty, and isFull operations.
